ngsmcconfig.confirmreset.text: Are you sure you want to reset your entire config?
ngsmcconfig.confirmunsavedexit.text: There are some unsaved changes, are you sure you want to leave and discard those unsaved changes?
hudder.general.enabled.tooltip: Whether Hudder should be enabled or not.
hudder.general.mainfile.tooltip:
Change the main hud file.§7
The file must be located in the §6.minecraft/config/Hudder§7 folder.
hudder.general.mainfile.error: File does not exist in the .minecraft/config/Hudder folder.
hudder.general.compilertype.tooltip: Change the type of compiler (ex hudder, js, pack).
hudder.general.scale.tooltip:
Control the default scale of Hud Elements and text.
§7This can be overriden by elements specifying the size on their own.
hudder.text_rendering.color.tooltip: Change the color of the text.
hudder.text_rendering.backgroundcolor.to: Change the default color of the background.
hudder.text_rendering.background.tooltip: Whether should add a background to the text by default.
hudder.text_rendering.shadow.tooltip: Whether text should have a shadow.
hudder.text_rendering.height.tooltip: Control the line height of the text.
hudder.text_padding.yoffset_top.tooltip: Control the top padding of the text.
hudder.text_padding.xoffset_left.tooltip: Control the left padding of the text.
hudder.text_padding.yoffset_bottom.toolt: Control the bottom padding of the text.
hudder.text_padding.xoffset_right.toolti: Control the right padding of the text.
hudder.vanillahud.f3.tooltip: Should still render when f3 is showing.
hudder.vanillahud.removehotbar.tooltip:
§4WARNING - THIS WILL MAKE YOUR HOTBAR AND HEALTH BAR INVISIBLE UNTIL DISABLED.
§fWhether hudder should hide all Hotbar related GUI elements.
hudder.vanillahud.removeeffects.tooltip:
§4WARNING - THIS WILL MAKE YOUR EFFECTS HUD INVISIBLE UNTIL DISABLED.
§fWhether hudder should hide the effects hud.
hudder.safety_perf.method.tooltip: Control the amount of lines to be trimmed before and after Methods.
hudder.safety_perf.unsafeoperations.tool:
§4WARNING - ONLY ENABLE IF YOU KNOW WHAT YOUR HUD DOES.
§fEnabling this gives access to blocked features as well as removing certain limitations from existing ones (See Wiki for more information).
hudder.safety_perf.limitrate.tooltip:
§4WARNING - THIS MAY CAUSE PERFORMANCE ISSUES.
§fDisabling this will move hudder file compilation from running every client tick to running every frame.
hudder.safety_perf.autorefresh.tooltip: Disabling this will stop your hud from updating with every change. Manual refreshes through the keybind will still function
